offer: For logistics carriers processing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient fleet maintenance scheduling causes increased downtime. We automate tracking and optimizing maintenance schedules instead of manual tracking and scheduling.
problem: inefficient fleet maintenance scheduling leading to increased downtime
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
